comment: 19yo male, recently confirmed VHL c.500G>A (Arg167Gln) pathogenic variant (cascade testing after father's cerebellar hemangioblastoma + pheochromocytoma). No personal lesions yet on baseline imaging. Engine routes to PreventionPlan (after Agent I): standard = VHL Alliance Active Surveillance protocol — MRI brain + spine q1y from age 15-16 (started 4 years ago), MRI abdomen (kidneys + adrenals + pancreas) q1-2y from age 15, ophthalmology q1y (started at age 1-5 ideally, currently catching up), catecholamines / metanephrines q1y from age 5-10, comprehensive audiology q2-3y; alternative = intensified track with nephron-sparing surgery threshold for renal lesions ≥3cm + CNS hemangioblastoma resection threshold discussion. Canonical 'family-with-kidney-cancer' protocol — RCC is the leading cause of mortality in adult VHL carriers.
